name: Xchanging Solutions Limited
summary: Xchanging Solutions Limited provides information technology services in India, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Cambridge Solutions Limited and changed its name to Xchanging Solutions Limited in June 2012. Xchanging Solutions Limited was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Bengaluru, India. Xchanging Solutions Limited operates as a subsidiary of Xchanging (Mauritius) Limited.
